"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\MiniRedis.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\MiniRedis.dir/objects.a CMakeFiles/MiniRedis.dir/src/main.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/MiniRedis.dir/src/CommandParser.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/MiniRedis.dir/src/TCPServer.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/MiniRedis.dir/src/Node.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/MiniRedis.dir/src/DoublyLinkedList.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/MiniRedis.dir/src/LRUCache.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/MiniRedis.dir/src/PersistenceManager.cpp.obj
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\c++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\MiniRedis.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o MiniRedis.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libMiniRedis.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0  -lws2_32 -lkernel32 -luser32 -lgdi32 -lwinspool -lshell32 -lole32 -loleaut32 -luuid -lcomdlg32 -ladvapi32
